---
title: "Publications"
subtitle: "Peer-reviewed articles, books, and working papers from the group"
---

<!-- TODO: populate with the group's publication list. Recommended format below;
     consider generating this list from a shared BibTeX/Zotero library so it can
     be regenerated automatically rather than maintained by hand. -->

### 2026

- Author(s). (2026). *Title of the article.* Journal Name. [DOI/link]

### 2025

- Author(s). (2025). *Title of the article.* Journal Name. [DOI/link]

---

<!-- TODO: link out to each researcher's Google Scholar / ORCID profile once confirmed. -->
